category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Bahrain) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Bahrain Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入巴林：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入巴林：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Bahrain requirements: BSMD/GSO conformity under MOIC, GSO IEC 62133 cell safety, EMC, TRA wireless type approval, UN 38.3 transport, and the in-country importer obligation. Bahrain mains supply is 230 V, 50 Hz.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与巴林要求对照：MOIC下BSMD/GSO符合性、GSO IEC 62133电芯安全、EMC、TRA无线型号核准、UN 38.3运输及在地进口商义务。巴林市电为230伏、50赫兹。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與巴林要求對照：MOIC下BSMD/GSO符合性、GSO IEC 62133電芯安全、EMC、TRA無線型號核准、UN 38.3運輸及在地進口商義務。巴林市電為230伏、50赫茲。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters to Bahrain must address BSMD/GSO conformity under the MOIC where the product is in scope, GSO IEC 62133 cell/pack safety, EMC, TRA type approval for any wireless function, UN 38.3 transport classification, and an in-country importer — none of which are satisfied by Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification alone.
answer_first.zh: 中国锂电池及移动电源出口巴林时，须应对MOIC下产品在范围内时的BSMD/GSO符合性、GSO IEC 62133电芯/电池组安全、EMC、任何无线功能的TRA型号核准、UN 38.3运输分类及在地进口商——上述要求均无法仅由中国GB 31241或CCC认证替代。
answer_first.zht: 中國鋰電池及行動電源出口巴林時，須應對MOIC下產品在範圍內時的BSMD/GSO符合性、GSO IEC 62133電芯/電池組安全、EMC、任何無線功能的TRA型號核准、UN 38.3運輸分類及在地進口商——上述要求均無法僅由中國GB 31241或CCC認證替代。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, or on material regulatory change
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true. Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal sources preferred (bsmd.gov.bh, moic.gov.bh, gso.org.sa, tra.org.bh, iec.ch, unece.org).
